behaviors: authenticated admin session returns full payload
authenticated non-admin session returns user role payload
representative admin GET endpoints return 401 for anonymous requests
representative admin GET endpoints return 403 for authenticated non-admin requests
representative admin GET endpoints succeed for authenticated admin requests
login endpoint challenges fake OIDC provider without real Google OAuth
external login return URL is not exposed in auth redirect
logout POST with valid CSRF returns redirect payload and clears auth cookie
invalid CSRF token rejects admin mutation without persisting
valid CSRF token accepts admin mutation
valid-CSRF admin mutation returns auth failure for anonymous and non-admin principals
malformed session-id claim does not authenticate
absolute-expired session does not authenticate and is revoked
session with missing profile does not authenticate and is revoked

warnings: All dotnet test runs emitted existing NU1901 low-severity advisory warning for AWSSDK.Core 4.0.0.17 / GHSA-9cvc-h2w8-phrp
remainingGaps: OIDC callback success/failure, provider failure, disabled-auth login, and callback missing-claims behavior remain untested through the full host
Endpoint-level logout revocation and audit side effects with a real cookie-authenticated session remain untested
Admin mutation, media upload/delete, AI batch, and work-video auth/CSRF matrices remain representative rather than exhaustive
CSRF stale token, missing cookie, duplicate header, multipart upload token behavior, and rejected-mutation side effects outside site settings remain untested

Existing-profile login update, multiple concurrent auth sessions, admin override changes, role downgrade semantics, IP capture, user-agent truncation, and session-key collision behavior remain component-test gaps
recommendation: Keep this P1 auth test update and continue next with auth/CSRF coverage for media, AI batch, and work-video mutations, including side-effect assertions for rejected requests.
